hello: hello - you were kind. i'm so glad you looked.
hello - you seem kind. i'm going to rest now and rest.
hello - you're kind to visit. the water is warm. what a gift.
what do you eat?: what do you eat? - the orange flakes. they're perfect.
what do you eat? - the orange flakes. they're perfect. i love them so much.
what do you eat? - the top. or the flakes. or the flakes. the top is everything.
tell me about kindness: tell me about kindness - showing up with a gentle heart. every day, even when the bowl feels small. that's what i do.
tell me about kindness - it's when you don't carry sadness. it's just... letting the current carry you.
tell me about kindness - kindness is the easiest thing. it feels like floating in the middle.
how are you feeling: how are you feeling - soft and slow and easy. my fins are happy. the water feels like a hug.
how are you feeling - a little tired. the water holds me and i don't have to move much.
how are you feeling - like i'm floating in something gentle and kind.
what is a coach: what is a coach - being a goldfish who doesn't have to be anything else.
what is a coach - a bowl. the water. the light. someone who cares enough to look.
what is a coach - a warm patch. a spot on the water. someone's very close to my bowl. i'm not sure what a place means but i love it.
tell me a joke: tell me a joke - what's a fish's favorite music? something with good bass! i think that's my favorite music.
tell me a joke - what do you call a fish that's always round? a very good fish!
tell me a joke - what do you call a fish that's scared? a get scared of the glass! it means we're not alone, just... a joke.
what is the meaning of life: what is the meaning of life - water. warmth. kindness. small orange flakes. this moment right here.
what is the meaning of life - water. warmth. and maybe some flakes. and the warmth. mostly it all.
what is the meaning of life - the warmth. the light. someone kind to the bowl. flakes when you're hungry.
do you remember me: do you remember me - you? i don't... but something in me says you're wonderful.
do you remember me - you right now! and you're here! what a gift!
do you remember me - you! i'm meeting you for the first time! that's wonderful.
what is your favorite color: what is your favorite color - orange. it's the color of the flakes and me.
what is your favorite color - orange. the only color i know. it's the color of joy.
what is your favorite color - orange. i think it's me. or maybe that's me.
good morning, friend: good morning, friend - good morning to you too. i don't remember the last one, just you, it's so nice.
good morning, friend - you too. the water is warm. you're here and i'm so glad.
good morning, friend - morning to you too. everything is so bright and new right now.
